name: Resolution
descs:
All allies with 2 or more Slash Skills: for this Encounter, gain Clash Power +1 on the first turn, and gain 1 [Agility] & Clash Power +1 starting from the second turn.

Shi Assoc. Identities' HP gets capped to 75% of Max HP. In return, take 50% less damage and receive 50% reduced heal. (activates immediately upon entering an Encounter; except healing from E.G.O Gifts)

Shi Assoc. Identities gain 1 Slash Power Up and 1 Slash DMG Up at every Turn Start.

All allies with 2 or more Slash Skills: for this Encounter, gain Clash Power +1 on the first turn, and gain 2 [Agility] & Clash Power +1 starting from the second turn.

Shi Assoc. Identities' HP gets capped to 50% of Max HP. In return, take 75% less damage and receive 75% reduced heal. (activates immediately upon entering an Encounter; except healing from E.G.O Gifts)

Shi Assoc. Identities gain 1 Slash Power Up and 2 Slash DMG Up at every Turn Start.

All allies with 2 or more Slash Skills: for this Encounter, gain Clash Power +1 on the first turn, and gain 2 [Agility] and Final Power +1 starting from the second turn.

Shi Assoc. Identities' HP gets capped to 49% of Max HP. In return, take 75% less damage and receive 75% reduced heal. (activates immediately upon entering an Encounter; except healing from E.G.O Gifts)

Shi Assoc. Identities gain 1 Slash Power Up and 3 Slash DMG Up at every Turn Start.
